LanguageData.Ammo_RPG16Grenade_HEAT.label: RPG-16 grenade (HEAT)
LanguageData.Ammo_RPG16Grenade_HEAT.description: Rocket-propelled grenade designed for the RPG-16 launcher. After being fired a rocket motor kicks in to propel the grenade further.
LanguageData.Ammo_RPG16Grenade_Frag.label: RPG-16 grenade (Frag)
LanguageData.Ammo_RPG16Grenade_Frag.description: Rocket-propelled grenade designed for the RPG-16 launcher. After being fired a rocket motor kicks in to propel the grenade further.
LanguageData.Bullet_RPG16Grenade_HEAT.label: RPG-16 grenade (HEAT)
LanguageData.Bullet_RPG16Grenade_Frag.label: RPG-16 grenade (Frag)
